title: Everything you need to build with Kiriku
subtitle: Complete documentation for the intelligent document extraction API

apiOverview.title: API Overview
apiOverview.authenticationDesc: All API requests require a valid JWT token
apiOverview.responseDesc: All responses are returned in JSON format

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: All secure API requests require a JWT token in the Authorization header.
auth.headerFormat:
# Authorization header format
Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_JWT_TOKEN>

# Get your token via the authentication endpoint
curl -X POST https://api.kiriku.app/v1/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "your@email.com",
    "password": "your_password"
  }'

documents.title: Supported Document Types
documents.cniSenegalDesc: Senegalese national identity card, front and back

quickStartGuide.title: Quick Start
quickStartGuide.desc: Extract data from an identity document in seconds
quickStartGuide.multipart:
# Quick extraction (multipart) - send options as separate fields (recommended)
curl -X POST https://api.kiriku.app/v1/extract \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" \
  -F "file=@/path/to/cni_recto.jpg" \
  -F "documentType=cni-senegal" \
  -F "fraudCheck=true" \
  -F "returnConfidence=true" \
  -F "returnRawText=false"
quickStartGuide.jsonVariant:
# Variant: send options in a single JSON field
curl -X POST https://api.kiriku.app/v1/extract \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>" \
  -F "file=@/path/to/cni_recto.jpg" \
  -F "documentType=cni-senegal" \
  -F "options={\"fraudCheck\":true,\"returnConfidence\":true,\"returnRawText\":false}"

errors.title: Error Handling
errors.desc: The API returns standard HTTP codes and structured error messages.
